creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #0)

<https://vermaden.wordpress.com/2018/10/11/freebsd-desktop-part-17-automount-removable-media/>

Whilst here: vermaden, you might like to make minor changes. 


> sysutils/dsbmd … provides graphical fronted in GTK+ toolkit …

If I understand correctly, the GUI is provided: 

* by sysutils/dsbmc

* not by the sysutils/dsbmd daemon.


> # pkg install dsbmc-cli dsbmc dsbmd

Instead, just two: 

# pkg install dsbmc-cli dsbmc

– so, installation of dsbmd should be automatic. 


Thanks
